name: Access of Resource Using Incompatible Type ('Type Confusion')
description: The product allocates or initializes a resource using one type but later accesses it using an incompatible type, causing logical errors and in memory-unsafe languages potentially enabling out-of-bounds memory access, data corruption, or code execution.
detection_pattern: STORAGE[resource] is created with one type via TRANSFORM[allocation/initialization] but later accessed through TRANSFORM[type_cast/access] using an incompatible type, without a CONTROL[type_check] node verifying type compatibility before access
